props.ChoiceText: You learned that a wheellock pistol is as much a device of discipline and expense as it is a weapon.
props.ChoiceBio: Pistol drill made you part of a newer, costlier, and more exacting kind of mounted war.

0.TransitionText: Because pistol drill made you part of a newer, costlier, and more exacting kind of mounted war, horseflesh, speed, and shock remained your proper element.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cavalry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because pistol drill made you part of a newer, costlier, and more exacting kind of mounted war, mounted reputation ripened into command.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because pistol drill made you part of a newer, costlier, and more exacting kind of mounted war, high war gave way to lower but more immediate pay.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
